title: Childcare Workers
description: Attend to children at schools, businesses, private households, and childcare institutions. Perform a variety of tasks, such as dressing, feeding, bathing, and overseeing play.

tasks.text: Maintain a safe play environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and monitor children's play activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate with children's parents or guardians about daily activities, behaviors, and related issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Support children's emotional and social development, encouraging understanding of others and positive self-concepts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Care for children in institutional setting, such as group homes, nursery schools, private businesses, or schools for people with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sanitize toys and play equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dress children and change diapers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records on individual children, including daily observations and information about activities, meals served, and medications administered.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Identify signs of emotional or developmental problems in children and bring them to parents' or guardians' attention.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct children in health and personal habits, such as eating, resting, and toilet habits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and store toys and materials to ensure order in activity areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform general administrative tasks, such as taking attendance, editing internal paperwork, and making phone calls.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create developmentally appropriate lesson plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform housekeeping duties, such as laundry, cleaning, dish washing, and changing of linens.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read to children and teach them simple painting, drawing, handicrafts, and songs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist in preparing food and serving meals and refreshments to children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discipline children and recommend or initiate other measures to control behavior, such as caring for own clothing and picking up toys and books.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Regulate children's rest periods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and participate in recreational activities and outings, such as games and field trips.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sterilize bottles and prepare formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help children with homework and school work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide care for children with physical, developmental, or mental health disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform general personnel functions, such as supervision, training, and scheduling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Accompany children to and from school, on outings, and to medical appointments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
